set -eu
mkdir -p '/workspace'
repository_was_cloned=0
if [ -d '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo/.git' ]; then
  git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' remote set-url origin 'https://github.com/sidpalas/deputies-dev-repo.git'
  git -c http.extraHeader="$GITHUB_AUTH_HEADER" -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' fetch --prune origin
else
  git -c http.extraHeader="$GITHUB_AUTH_HEADER" clone -- 'https://github.com/sidpalas/deputies-dev-repo.git' '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo'
  repository_was_cloned=1
fi
default_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' symbolic-ref --quiet --short refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's#^origin/##' || true)"
if [ -z "$default_branch" ]; then
  default_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/remotes/origin/main refs/remotes/origin/master | sed 's#^origin/##' | head -n 1)"
fi
default_branch='main'
if [ -n "$default_branch" ]; then
  if [ "$repository_was_cloned" = "1" ] || git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' diff --quiet --ignore-submodules -- && git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' diff --cached --quiet --ignore-submodules --; then
    git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' checkout -B 'main' 'origin/main'
  else
    current_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' branch --show-current || true)"
    if [ "$current_branch" != "$default_branch" ]; then
      echo "Repository has uncommitted changes; preserving checkout instead of switching branches." >&2
    fi
  fi
fi
git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' config user.name 'DevDeputies'
git -C '/workspace/deputies-dev-repo' config user.email 'devdeputies@users.noreply.github.com'

content.text:
# Agent Instructions

## Local Dependencies

Use the repo toolchain from `mise.toml`:

```sh
mise install
pnpm install
```

## Postgres In Daytona Sandboxes

Daytona sandboxes should not assume nested Docker or Docker Compose is available. For Postgres-backed tests, start Postgres directly inside the sandbox:

```sh
./deploy/daytona/start-postgres.sh
```

This creates and starts a local Postgres cluster and ensures these databases exist:

```text
deputies
deputies_test
```

Use these connection strings unless the task provides different ones:

```sh
export DATABASE_URL=postgres://deputies:deputies@127.0.0.1:5432/deputies
export TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgres://deputies:deputies@127.0.0.1:5432/deputies_test
```

Run migrations before API integration or UAT checks:

```sh
pnpm control-plane:db:migrate
```

## Full Sandbox Verification

For broad coverage inside a Daytona sandbox, run:

```sh
./deploy/daytona/full-check.sh
```

This starts Postgres, installs dependencies, runs migrations, then runs API typecheck/unit/integration tests and web typecheck/unit/e2e/build checks.

## Common Test Commands

```sh
pnpm control-plane:typecheck
pnpm control-plane:test
pnpm control-plane:test:integration
pnpm web:typecheck
pnpm web:test
pnpm web:e2e
pnpm web:build
```

## Web API Routes

When adding or changing browser-facing API routes, keep all local and deployed web proxies in sync:

- `apps/web/vite.config.ts` for Vite dev proxy routes.
- `apps/web/Caddyfile` for deployed/static web reverse proxy routes.
- `apps/web/Caddyfile.local` for local Caddy/portless reverse proxy routes.

If a route works in Vite dev but fails after deployment, check these Caddy matchers first.

Do not claim Postgres-backed tests could not run until you have tried `./deploy/daytona/start-postgres.sh` or confirmed the sandbox is not using the Daytona image from `deploy/daytona/Dockerfile`.

## Commits

Commit messages should follow Conventional Commits style.

args.command:
set -eu
mkdir -p '/workspace'
repository_was_cloned=0
if [ -d '/workspace/deputies/.git' ]; then
  git -C '/workspace/deputies' remote set-url origin 'https://github.com/sidpalas/deputies.git'
  git -c http.extraHeader="$GITHUB_AUTH_HEADER" -C '/workspace/deputies' fetch --prune origin
else
  git -c http.extraHeader="$GITHUB_AUTH_HEADER" clone -- 'https://github.com/sidpalas/deputies.git' '/workspace/deputies'
  repository_was_cloned=1
fi
default_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies' symbolic-ref --quiet --short refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's#^origin/##' || true)"
if [ -z "$default_branch" ]; then
  default_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies' for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/remotes/origin/main refs/remotes/origin/master | sed 's#^origin/##' | head -n 1)"
fi
default_branch='main'
if [ -n "$default_branch" ]; then
  if [ "$repository_was_cloned" = "1" ] || git -C '/workspace/deputies' diff --quiet --ignore-submodules -- && git -C '/workspace/deputies' diff --cached --quiet --ignore-submodules --; then
    git -C '/workspace/deputies' checkout -B 'main' 'origin/main'
  else
    current_branch="$(git -C '/workspace/deputies' branch --show-current || true)"
    if [ "$current_branch" != "$default_branch" ]; then
      echo "Repository has uncommitted changes; preserving checkout instead of switching branches." >&2
    fi
  fi
fi
git -C '/workspace/deputies' config user.name 'DevDeputies'
git -C '/workspace/deputies' config user.email 'devdeputies@users.noreply.github.com'

args.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import math, random, os
W,H=1200,800
img=Image.new('RGB',(W,H),(18,24,58))
d=ImageDraw.Draw(img)
# gradient sky
for y in range(H):
    t=y/H
    r=int(25+80*t); g=int(30+25*t); b=int(80+90*(1-t))
    d.line([(0,y),(W,y)], fill=(r,g,b))
# stars/confetti
random.seed(42)
for i in range(230):
    x=random.randint(0,W-1); y=random.randint(0,H-1)
    if random.random()<0.65:
        c=random.choice([(255,242,153),(255,138,216),(134,239,172),(125,211,252),(253,186,116)])
        r=random.randint(2,5)
        d.ellipse((x-r,y-r,x+r,y+r), fill=c)
    else:
        c=(255,255,230)
        d.line((x-6,y,x+6,y), fill=c, width=2)
        d.line((x,y-6,x,y+6), fill=c, width=2)
# moon disco ball
cx,cy=930,155
for rad,color in [(82,(249,250,251)),(74,(210,245,255)),(62,(255,255,255))]:
    d.ellipse((cx-rad,cy-rad,cx+rad,cy+rad), fill=color)
for a in range(0,360,20):
    x1=cx+math.cos(math.radians(a))*18; y1=cy+math.sin(math.radians(a))*18
    x2=cx+math.cos(math.radians(a))*76; y2=cy+math.sin(math.radians(a))*76
    d.line((x1,y1,x2,y2), fill=(140,180,220), width=2)
for rr in [25,48,68]:
    d.ellipse((cx-rr,cy-rr,cx+rr,cy+rr), outline=(140,180,220), width=2)
# ground
for y in range(595,H):
    t=(y-595)/(H-595)
    d.line([(0,y),(W,y)], fill=(35,130+int(50*t),85))
# rainbow road
road=[(120,800),(530,565),(670,565),(1080,800)]
d.polygon(road, fill=(60,62,130))
colors=[(239,68,68),(249,115,22),(250,204,21),(34,197,94),(59,130,246),(168,85,247)]
for idx,c in enumerate(colors):
    y0=620+idx*26
    d.arc((300,y0-270,900,y0+270), 200,340, fill=c, width=18)
# cute rocket-cat body
# rocket flame
d.polygon([(585,555),(545,650),(625,610),(665,650),(625,555)], fill=(255,209,102))
d.polygon([(595,575),(575,630),(620,604),(645,630),(620,575)], fill=(255,102,0))
# rocket
d.ellipse((470,300,730,590), fill=(245,245,255), outline=(40,45,80), width=6)
d.polygon([(470,445),(380,520),(495,515)], fill=(255,92,138), outline=(40,45,80))
d.polygon([(730,445),(820,520),(705,515)], fill=(255,92,138), outline=(40,45,80))
d.ellipse((540,360,660,480), fill=(125,211,252), outline=(40,45,80), width=6)
d.ellipse((570,385,610,425), fill=(255,255,255))
# cat head in window
face=(255,214,170)
d.ellipse((555,375,645,465), fill=face, outline=(80,55,50), width=3)
d.polygon([(570,385),(585,350),(600,390)], fill=face, outline=(80,55,50))
d.polygon([(630,385),(615,350),(600,390)], fill=face, outline=(80,55,50))
d.ellipse((580,410,590,420), fill=(30,30,30)); d.ellipse((615,410,625,420), fill=(30,30,30))
d.polygon([(600,425),(594,435),(606,435)], fill=(255,105,180))
d.arc((585,430,600,448),0,160, fill=(80,55,50), width=2)
d.arc((600,430,615,448),20,180, fill=(80,55,50), width=2)
for yy in [426,436]:
    d.line((585,yy,550,yy-8), fill=(80,55,50), width=2); d.line((615,yy,650,yy-8), fill=(80,55,50), width=2)
# planets
for (px,py,pr,pc) in [(185,175,56,(251,146,60)),(190,174,68,(255,255,255)),(1010,430,46,(167,139,250))]:
    if pc==(255,255,255):
        d.arc((px-pr,py-pr//3,px+pr,py+pr//3), 5,175, fill=(255,238,180), width=8)
    else:
        d.ellipse((px-pr,py-pr,px+pr,py+pr), fill=pc, outline=(255,255,255), width=3)
# title
try:
    font_big=ImageFont.truetype('/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf',52)
    font_small=ImageFont.truetype('/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf',26)
except:
    font_big=font_small=None
text='Cosmic Cat Disco Rocket!'
bbox=d.textbbox((0,0),text,font=font_big)
d.rounded_rectangle((W/2-(bbox[2]-bbox[0])/2-25,35,W/2+(bbox[2]-bbox[0])/2+25,112), radius=25, fill=(0,0,0,90), outline=(255,255,255), width=2)
d.text((W/2-(bbox[2]-bbox[0])/2,45), text, font=font_big, fill=(255,255,255))
sub='Generated with sparkles, snacks, and zero gravity.'
bb=d.textbbox((0,0),sub,font=font_small)
d.text((W/2-(bb[2]-bb[0])/2,120), sub, font=font_small, fill=(220,245,255))
os.makedirs('/workspace/artifacts', exist_ok=True)
img.save('/workspace/artifacts/cosmic-cat-disco-rocket.png')
